entry.title: 女儿水痘
entry.content:
This dialogue is between a woman, Mrs. Wang, and her GP, regarding some rashes on her daughter’s skin.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good afternoon Mrs. Wang. This must be your daughter Lucy. How can I help you?15
M1我女儿发烧 37.8 度有两天了。她身上和脸上都长了很多小红点儿。但她的食欲很好，睡眠也没问题。您快帮她看看吧。我很担心。My daughter has had a temperature of 37.8 degrees for two days now. There are many red spots over her body and face. But she still has a good appetite and has no sleeping problems. Please have a look at her. I am so worried.
E2When did you first notice the rashes? Does she feel itchy or have any pain? I would like to find out some more details.24
M2昨天她从幼儿园回来说她不舒服。当时我看到她胸前有一些粉红色的皮疹。今天早上看到她脸上也起了很多疹子和水泡似的东西。我女儿觉得很痒，昨天晚上都影响她睡觉了。She complained she was not feeling well after coming back from kindergarten yesterday. I saw some pink rashes on her chest and I found many rashes and something like blisters on her face this morning. She said they were so itchy that she didn’t sleep well last night.
E3Let me have a look at Lucy. The rash appears in crops and papules, and there are blisters on the body, extremities and face, looking like ’dewdrops’ on a red base. She has chickenpox, which is an infectious disease.38
M3水痘？估计是幼儿园有其他的孩子得了水痘，我的女儿被传染了。那会不会留下疤痕啊? 要多久能好？我应该怎么在家照顾她啊？Chickenpox? It seems that my daughter contracted chickenpox from other kids who have it in the kindergarten. Will it leave any scars? How long does it take for the disease to be cured? What do I need to do at home to take care of her?
E4The crusts fall off in one to three weeks, leaving no scars. Please keep her away from other children until the crusts fall off completely. Give her plenty of water to drink. Keep her skin clean in order to prevent infection. Don’t let her scratch her skin.47
M4好的，我会的。不过要是特别痒她肯定会不停的抓的。您能给她开些口服药或者药膏吗？我不想我的女儿那么难受。OK. I will. But she will keep scratching if it is too itchy. Could you please prescribe some oral medicine or ointment for her? I don’t want to see her suffering.
E5I will give her some lotion and some medicine to control the itching. Lucy should start feeling better after about a week.21
M5好的，谢谢医生。我女儿昨天还和一个小朋友一起玩儿，希望她的朋友不会有什么事。OK. Thank you, doctor. My daughter played with one of her friends yesterday. I hope she won’t get infected.
E6If the fever persists or the symptoms get worse after a few days, please bring her back to see me again.21
M6我知道了。但愿我不用再过来见您。再见。I understand. I hope this is the last time that I see you for this matter. Good bye.

entry.title: 楼梯摔伤
entry.content:
The following dialogue takes place between a specialist and a patient, Mrs. Li, who has just broken her hip and arm.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning Mrs. Li. I’m Doctor Clark, an orthopaedic surgeon. How can I help you today?16
M1我从楼梯上摔下来，当时顿时觉得左胯部疼得厉害，根本没法自己站起来。现在还是觉得很疼。I felt a sharp pain in my left hip after I fell down the stairs. I couldn’t stand up by myself. Now it still hurts.
E2When did it happen? Have you taken any painkillers? If not, how did you manage the pain?17
M2昨天下午发生的。我什么药都没吃，我的家庭医生把我转介到这里的。主要是伤到了我的左胯部还有左臂。It happened yesterday afternoon. I didn’t take any medicine. My family doctor referred me to you. My left hip and left arm were seriously injured.
E3The x-ray and MRI results show a fracture in your left arm. To make sure the bone heals properly, I suggest you be admitted to the hospital. You need an operation to fix it. Is your left elbow still in pain?41
M3是的。受伤后左胳膊僵硬，发紫发胀。有时候还觉得很麻。什么都做不了,现在只能先在家。而且就算什么都不做，伤处都会疼。Yes. I felt stiffness in my left arm and it was swollen and turned blue. Sometimes I feel numbness. I’m not able to do anything now and have to stay at home for the time being. The injured parts are still in pain even when I stay still.
E4We will give you an “L” type plaster cast on your elbow and shoulder. You will have to have it for about six weeks.24
M4除了带石膏托外，我还需要注意什么吗？这是我第一次受这么严重的伤。Apart from wearing the plaster cast, what else do I need to pay attention to? It’s the first time that I’ve gotten injured so badly.
E5When you rest in bed, please keep your elbow higher than your heart. Move your finger joints from time to time. Keep an eye on the colour of your fingers. If you have pain and numbness or if the colour of the fingers turns paler or darker, please come back to see me straight away.55
M5好的，我知道一旦伤到骨头就很麻烦，需要很长时间才能恢复。我还想麻烦您一件事，我以前从来没住过院，您能不能帮我给医院打个电话，联系住院的事，或者让他们帮我安排一个翻译？Alright. I know that if you have broken bones it is a big hassle and will take a long time to heal. I would like to ask you to do me another favour. I’ve never been admitted to hospital before so could you please call the hospital to make the necessary arrangements for me or ask them to hire an interpreter for me?
E6No worries Mrs. Li. I’ll send the results back to your family doctor and either your GP or I will ring the hospital for you. I believe the hospital has an interpreting service available.35
M6多谢您了，大夫。Thank you, doctor.

entry.title: 工伤复查
entry.content:
A doctor is interviewing a patient, Mr. Xue, about an injury he received as a result of a work accident.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning Mr. Xue. Thanks for coming. I will ask you some questions about the accident and then we will examine your eyes. How is your right eye?28
M1感觉涩涩的。不舒服。您刚才一开灯我的右眼就感觉到疼痛。我现在对强光特别敏感。It’s dry and it feels uncomfortable. My right eye started to hurt as soon as you turned on the light. I am now especially sensitive to bright light.
E2I understand. From the file I can see that you were a gyprocker and you got injured on the 18th of March this year while you were working. Is that right?31
M2对。我当时正在一块金属板上钻洞突然间就感觉到一个很尖的东西飞进了眼睛里。可能是金属碎屑。我疼痛难忍我的同事马上送我去了医院。Yes. I was drilling holes on a metal sheet and suddenly something very sharp got into my eye. It could have been a piece of metal. The pain was killing me and my co-workers immediately took me to the hospital.
E3According to the file here, you stayed in the hospital for about two weeks. You had two operations after the injury. Have you gone back to the hospital or the specialist since you were discharged from the hospital? Are you on any medication now?44
M3出院后我还没有回过医院也没有去看过眼科医生。但是医生要我九月份的时候回去进行复查。I haven’t gone back to the hospital or seen an ophthalmologist after being discharged. But the doctor asked me to see him again in September.
E4I see. I will have a look at your right eye in a second. Before we do so, can you please tell me all your concerns about your right eye and how it affects your daily life?37
M4如果看到强光，眼睛就会疼，最主要的问题就是我看东西都是重影的，看东西都很模糊。眼睛有问题对我的生活有很大的影响。It’s painful whenever I see bright light and the main problem is I have double and blurred vision. This eye problem has caused me a lot of trouble in my daily life.
E5Can you give some examples, like what things you were able to do but can no longer do since the injury?19
M5我现在已经不能再回到原来的地方工作了，而且也不能开车，害怕出危险。两只眼睛经常涩涩的，还经常发红。I can’t go back to my previous job anymore and I’m not able to drive anymore because I am afraid of having a car accident. My eyes are often dry and they often turn red.
E6Thanks Mr. Xue. Please follow me to another room and I’ll examine your eyes. We should be finished very soon.20
M6好的，谢谢你，医生。Alright. Thanks Doctor.

entry.title: 戒酒失败
entry.content:
This is a dialogue between Mr. Zhong, a recovering alcoholic, and Mr. James, a social worker, about the progress of Mr. Zhong’s recovery.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Hello, Mr. Zhong. Thanks for coming in today. I’d like to have a chat with you and see how you are doing these days.
M1你好，James 先生。老实说，我最近又开始喝酒了，我妻子因此很伤心，她不想看到我做出了这么大的努力最后还是失败。Hello, Mr James. To be honest, I’ve started drinking again recently. My wife is very sad about it. She doesn’t want to see me fail after all the effort I’ve put in.
E2I see. A little setback is inevitable. In the initial stages, you should set a more realistic goal, say, not drinking for at least three days per week.
M2我也知道要一步一步来，但我越不让自己喝越是想喝。而且我清醒的时候感觉很空虚害怕， 醉了反而舒服。I know I need to take one step at a time, but the harder I try to stop myself from drinking, the stronger my cravings become. Also, I feel empty and afraid when I’m sober, but comfortable when I’m drunk.
E3Those are called withdrawal symptoms. It’s because you are dependent on alcohol, both physically and psychologically. To reduce your dependence, you need to stay away from alcohol and your old drinking buddies as much as possible.
M3这点我深有体会。几个老朋友上星期他们硬要拉我去喝酒，结果我们喝了个通宵。我不能一直这样下去。I can totally relate to that. Several old friends insisted on having a drink with me last week, and we ended up drinking the whole night. I can’t keep doing this.
E4I’m glad you’ve realised the importance of a positive environment for your recovery. That’s why you need a strong support group that helps and encourages you throughout the process.29
M4我知道。可是我内心深处还是很不安，我的生活一团糟，看不到希望，我总觉得自己是个受害者。I understand. But I still feel uneasy deep down. My life is a mess and I can’t see any hope. I often feel like I’m a victim.
E5Well, self-pity is likely to lead you back into drinking again. Why not see things in a different way? You are taking steps to regain control of your life. That’s very brave.32
M5对呀，我应该乐观一点的。人们常说，态度决定一切。我要试着改变自己的态度。That’s right. I should be more optimistic. People often say that attitude is everything. I’ll try to change my attitude.
E6That’s the spirit! Remember you are not in this alone. Give us a call or come back anytime when you need support.22
M6太谢谢了。我会尽自己的努力让生活重回正轨的。Thank you so much. I’ll do my best to get my life back on track.

entry.title: 裁员社保
entry.content:
This is a dialogue between James (J), a Centrelink Officer, and Mr Liang (L). Mr Liang is enquiring about his eligibility for a Low Income Health Care Card.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1不好意思啊，先生！我迟到了几分钟。是巴士晚点了，真的很抱歉。I am very sorry sir. I’m a few minutes late. The bus was late, I am really sorry.
M1No worries Mr. Liang. My name is James Morris. How may I help you today?15
E2最近我们公司需要缩减开支，必须要裁员，我也是其中之一。所以我来这看看有什么福利我可以申请。Recently, my employer needed to reduce his expenses and had to make some staff redundant, and I was made redundant. That’s why I’m here to see what sorts of benefits I can apply for.
M2You may be eligible for the “New Start Allowance” and a “Low Income Health Care Card”. Are you still engaged in any sort of employment, for example, working part-time or working as a casual employee?35
E3有呀。我仍然在我朋友的餐馆做服务员。每周工作三天。虽然薪水不算好，不过，好就好在它可以包午餐和晚餐。Yes, I’m working in my friend’s restaurant as a waiter. I work 3 days a week. The pay is not that good but the good thing is that lunch and dinner are provided.
M3In this case, I’m afraid that you can only apply for the latter one, which is the “Low Income Health Care Card”. It gives low-income earners access to cheaper prescription medicines, and various concessions from government and private organisations.40
E4听起来不错。那我该怎么申请这张卡呢？我身体不大好，所以总是要去看医生、买药什么的。如果有了这张卡，一定会帮到我很多的。It sounds great. How can I apply for this card? I have some health issues so I always need to see a doctor and buy medication. It will help me a lot if I have this card.
M4You may be eligible for the card if you meet the income test. For a single person, your weekly income must not exceed $497 or $3,976 in 8 weeks.39
E5我的收入肯定没有这个数！我还有个问题，这个卡是跟政府的保健医疗卡一样，有五年的有效期吗？My income is definitely less than that. I have one more question, is this card valid for 5 years, just like the Medicare card?
M5Mr Liang, you need to renew this card every 6 months and every time you are required to show evidence in order to qualify for it.26
E6什么，这么麻烦？那我都需要带什么材料呢？我能用我的工资单和银行对账单作为证明材料吗？你这儿有申请表吗？What? That’s a real hassle! So what should I bring? Can I use my payslips and bank statements as evidence? Do you have the application form here?
M6Yes, that’s fine. I can give you a copy of the application form, just a second.16

entry.title: 社福拒保
entry.content:
This dialogue is between a Centrelink officer and Mr. Jiang, whose application for a Centrelink payment has just been refused.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Morning，Mr Jiang. We are here to discuss the benefit that you applied for. I am afraid the payment you applied for cannot be approved.
M1为什么啊？我现在经济很拮据，所以我很需要这笔家庭补助，我的条件不是都符合吗？为什么拿不到补助呢？Why? I am now experiencing financial hardship so I really need this payment. Don’t I meet all the requirements? Why can’t I get it?
E2Mr. Jiang, as the guidelines indicate, in order to be granted the benefit, you are subject to both an income test and an assets test. You cannot be eligible for the benefit unless you pass both of them.
M2我现在失业，我妻子自从生完孩子会就因为身体原因无法上班，我们现在没有其他经济来源，连房子都是租的，这还不够条件吗？I don’t have a job now and my wife can no longer go to work because of her physical condition after giving birth. We don’t have any other source of income and we live in a rented place. Isn’t that enough for us to be eligible?
E3Mr. Jiang, I understand that you are in financial difficulty, which is in line with the result of our investigation. Basically, you have passed the income test but problems occurred when it came to the assets test.
M3资产测试不就是检查我们名下的资产状况吗？我们现在基本没什么资产，银行就剩那点存款了，你们完全可以去查。另外，我们也没有任何房产，现在的房子都是租的，我也提供了租赁合同不是吗？The asset test is to assess the assets under our names, right? We don’t have many assets except for our small savings in the bank. You can go and check it. Apart from that, we don’t have any properties and we’re renting the place we live in. I have provided the lease, haven’t I?
E4Mr. Jiang, our officers have investigated your assets thoroughly and it was found out that you did not report your assets truthfully. Your savings and lease are fine. However, it seems that you did not provide a proper account in terms of property possession.
M4我的资产都在这了，除了房子，我们也没有任何的股票证券之类的投资，总之我们就是一穷二白啊，我们应该享受社会福利啊。My assets are all here. Except the house, we don’t have any other investment like stocks and securities. We are very poor and I think we are entitled to the social welfare benefits.
E5Even though you do not have property yourself, you may be able to inherit a house from one of your distant relatives with no heirs or family, which you didn’t inform us about. In this case, it can be considered as intentionally providing misleading or false information for financial benefit.
M5我不是故意的啊，的确是有这么回事，但谁知道以后会怎么样啊，我当时就想，万一写上这一点，会影响我的测试结果，所以就没写。I didn’t mean to do so. That’s true but no one knows what will happen later. I thought if I put it in my application, it would affect the test results, so I didn’t.
E6Mr. Jiang, you are obliged to provide truthful information to Centrelink. Otherwise, you are committing an offence and you can make us doubt the overall credibility of your documents, thus severely affecting your eligibility for the benefit.
M6我知道了，我真的不是故意的，我发誓，以后一定如实报告一切情况，绝不遗漏。I see. I didn’t do it on purpose, I swear. I will report everything truthfully next time with no information missing.

entry.title: 丧妻社福
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mr. Hu and Larry, a Centrelink customer service officer. Mr. Hu has recently lost his wife.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning Mr. Hu. Please come in and have a seat. Now, how can I help you today?17
M1我的妻子最近因为乳腺癌去世了。我的朋友建议我来这里咨询一下，看看能否获得什么帮助。My wife passed away of breast cancer recently. My friend recommended that I come here and make an enquiry about what kind of help I can get from you.
E2I’m very sorry for your loss, Mr. Hu. Are you receiving any income support payments at the moment? If not, you may be entitled to a Bereavement Allowance.29
M2没有，我一直都在工作，开大巴，虽然工资不高，但还比较稳定。我妻子在世的时候有领疾病津贴，因为她身患癌症不能工作。No. I have been working the whole time as a coach driver. The pay is not high but it’s stable. My wife was receiving a Sickness Allowance before she died because she was diagnosed with cancer and was unable to work.
E3In that case, you should be eligible for the allowance but the amount you can get depends on your assets and income. I’m sure you have gone through these kinds of tests before.33
M3是的，但我只知道你们需要评估我的资产。但我还是有些疑问。比如，哪些资产是需要被评估的？我有一处投资的房产，这要算在内吗？Yes, but I only knew that you would assess my assets. I still have some questions. For example, which assets should be included in this assessment? I have an investment property. Does it need to be included?
E4Yes, we need to assess the value of your assets, which includes any money you have, any real estate you own other than your principle home and any motor vehicles you own. You can find the complete list on this fact sheet.42
M4那收入测试是怎样的呢？我现在一周大概能挣个六百来块钱。我在银行还有五万元的定期存款，每年能有大概三千元的利息。您觉得我满足收入测试的要求吗？How does the income test work? I earn about 600 dollars a week now and I have a 50,000-dollar term deposit in the bank and it yields about 3,000 dollars annually. Do I meet the requirements of the income test?
E5Well, I can’t give you a definite answer right now before the test is done. However, if your fortnightly income is less than $1647.60 you may be eligible for a part pension.32
M5其实钱有多少我无所谓。最大的痛苦是以后的人生我只能一个人度过了。我不知道我能否忍受这样的孤独。我要是跟我妻子一起去另一个世界就好了。In fact, it doesn’t matter how much I can get. The most painful thing is that I have to live alone for the rest of my life. I don’t know if I can stand such loneliness. I wish I could have gone with my wife.
E6You really have my sympathy Mr. Hu. I understand this is a really tough time for you. We can refer you to an expert grievance counsellor or other such services. I’m sure they can help you get through all this.40
M6好的，非常感谢你的热心帮助。等我准备好材料再来见你。Ok. Thank you for your kind help. I will come back to see you when I have the documents ready.

entry.title: 公司福利
entry.content:
The dialogue between Mrs. Li and Hector resumes after Hector finishes talking with his supervisor.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Sorry for keeping you waiting Mrs. Li. Let’s get back to business. We were talking about…16
M1你说我也许还能获得其他的福利，比如药品，房租什么的。You said I may be eligible for other welfare benefits as well, such as something for medicine or rent.
E2Right. Normally Sickness Allowance recipients are entitled to other payments. First is the Pharmaceutical Allowance, which helps you with the cost of prescription medicines. The fortnightly payment is $3.10 for each person.32
M2这也太少了吧，还不够我买盒止痛药呢。不管了，聊胜于无吧。那你说的租房补助呢？That’s not even enough for me to buy a pack of painkillers. Never mind, it’s better than nothing. What about rent assistance?
E3Given you are over 25, with no dependent children and are going to receive the Sickness Allowance, you can receive rent assistance as long as you are not renting public accommodation.33
M3这太好了，我是和私人房东签的租约，房租每周 400 块。你说我现在没有孩子，所以可以领租房补贴，那我生了孩子之后是不是就领不了了？That’s great. I signed the lease with a private landlord and the rent is 400 dollars per week. You said that I am eligible for rent assistance because I don’t have any kids. Will I still be able to receive it after I give birth to my child?
E4That’s not the case. Normally, if you have a dependent child and get more than the base rate of the Family Tax Benefit, you can still keep receiving the money. So don’t worry too much, Mrs Li.37
M4是这样啊。我记得你说过我还可以获得电话费补助的。我家没有固话，只有手机，这包含在内吗？Oh, I see. I remember you also mentioned that I can get a telephone allowance. But I don’t have a fixed line at home, I only have a mobile phone. Does that count?
E5Let me check. Oh, sorry, I’m afraid you are not entitled to the allowance because only Sickness Allowance recipients who are over 60 can receive a telephone allowance.28
M5哦，没关系。虽然每笔福利的数额并不大，但加在一起还是挺可观的。确实能解我们的燃眉之急。Well, no worries. Each payment is not much but they’ll add up to a sizeable sum of money. It will definitely help solve our immediate problems.
E6Now, I’m going to get all the forms you need. Just fill them out and bring them back with all the supporting documents to make a claim.27
M6非常感谢你的耐心帮助。等我丈夫伤好了，我会让他来当面感谢你的。Thank you for your patience and help. I will ask my husband to come and thank you in person when he recovers from his injuries.

entry.title: 疾病津贴
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mrs. Lu and Henry, a Centrelink officer. Mrs. Lu is enquiring about rent assistance.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Hello, Mrs. Li. I’m going to be looking after you today. How are you?14
M1谢谢你关心。我要是能回答“我很好”的话那就好了。不过话说回来，我要是很好的话，我就不用到这儿来了。Thanks for caring, but I wish I could tell you “I’m fine”. But anyway, I wouldn’t be here if I was.
E2I’m sorry to hear that. All right, now, can you tell me what happened, so I can figure out how I may assist you?24
M2我的丈夫上周外出购物时被一辆车撞了，一条腿骨折。因为他一个叉车司机，这下至少好几个月不能上班。可是，他是我们家的主要收入来源。My husband was hit by a car when he went out shopping last week and his leg was broken. He is a fork-lift driver so he won’t be able to work for at least several months. But, he is the main source of income in our family.
E3In this case we may be able to help you with the Sickness Allowance, which assists you if you are employed, including if you are self- employed, or if you are temporarily unable to work because of a medical condition.39
M3那可是雪中送炭。因为我丈夫只有 10 天的带薪病假，而我则是偶尔做做保姆挣一点钱。要是没这笔津贴，家里就要入不敷出了。That would be very timely help for us. My husband only has 10 days of paid sick leave and I’m only doing some nursing work occasionally to make some extra money. Without this payment, we’d have great difficulty making ends meet.
E4Please be aware that your husband will need to get his doctor to fill out a medical certificate, preferably a Centrelink medical certificate, which confirms he is medically unfit for his usual work.33
M4这个没问题。那我们可以领取多少疾病津贴呢？是你们一批准我的申请，我就可以开始领取吗？No problem. How much money can we get under the Sickness Allowance? Will I get paid immediately as soon as my application is approved by you?
E5The amount of money you get under the Sickness Allowance depends on both you and your husband’s income and assets. The maximum fortnightly amount you can get is $439.40 each. You are not usually paid for the first 7 days that you are eligible for the Sickness Allowance.48
M5除了疾病津贴，我们是否能够领取其他津贴呢？我最近刚刚怀孕了，我们也打算给宝宝攒点钱呢。Are we eligible for other benefits, apart from the sickness allowance? I just got pregnant and we are planning to save some money for the baby as well.
E6If you qualify for the Sickness Allowance you may be entitled to other payments and benefits, such as a pharmaceutical allowance, rent assistance and telephone allowance. Excuse me for a moment, my supervisor wants to talk to me.38
M6好的，不急。我先在这里看一下这些中文的小册子。All right. Take your time. I will go through some brochures in Chinese here first.

entry.title: 涨租社福
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mrs. Lu and Henry, a Centrelink officer. Mrs. Lu is enquiring about rent assistance.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Hello, Mrs. Lu. My name is Henry. How have things been recently?12
M1说实话，糟透了。我之前找到一份清洁的兼职，所以你们减少了我的失业金。现在他们不需要我了，你们是否能将失业金调高？To be honest, things couldn’t be worse. I found a part-time cleaning job, so you lowered my payment. Now they don’t want me anymore, so can you now increase the payment again?
E2After we have re-assessed your income we’ll decide whether your payment should be increased. Just fill out this form and it should be done within three working days.28
M2还有一件事, 我想看看你们是否还能帮我什么。上周房东通知我要涨房租了。要是你们不帮我，我就要无家可归了。One more thing, I want to see what else you can help me with. Last week the landlord said he would raise the rent. I will be homeless if you don’t help me.
E3I think our rent assistance may offer you a lot of help in your current dilemma. You are getting more than the base rate of Family Tax Benefit and you’re over 25 years old. Is your landlord a private one?40
M3是的，是我通过一家房产中介找到他的。我已经在那儿住了两年。我也试过申请公租房，但没申请到。你为什么问这个？Yes, I found him through a property agent. I have been living there for two years. I tried to apply for public housing, but in the end I didn’t get it. Why do you ask?
E4Rent Assistance is generally not payable if you have a lease with a state or territory housing authority or if you own or are buying the home in which you live, except for mobile and relocatable homes.39
M4我要是有自己的房子就好了。你们会付给我多少租房补助呢？希望不是杯水车薪。I wish I had my own property. How much will you pay me in rent assistance? I hope it’s not an insignificant amount.
E5You are single, aren’t you? If your fortnightly rent is more than $265.40, you can receive the maximum payment of rent assistance which is $119.40 per fortnight.27
M5我只是租了整栋房其中的一间，所以我没有正式的租约，在这种情况下我应该如何证明我交的房租是多少呢？I am only renting one room in that house, so I didn’t sign any formal lease. Under such circumstances, how can I prove how much rent I am paying?
E6You need to complete a Rent Certificate and the person you pay rent to will need to sign it. When we’ve got the certificate we’ll calculate how much you can get.31
M6那好，我明白了，非常感谢。Ok, I see. Thank you very much.

entry.title: 丧亲社福
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mr. Guan and Adam, a Centrelink officer. Mr. Guan is taking care of his nephew who has just lost both parents.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good afternoon, Mr. Guan. You said on the phone that you were in a very difficult situation. Can you tell me what happened?22
M1我是为我的侄子 Andrew 而来。他的父母，也就是我的弟弟和弟媳，两周前在一场惨烈的车祸中丧生了。所以我来看看是否能从这儿获得一些帮助，来帮我们度过难关。I came here for my nephew, Andrew. His parents, who are my brother and sister-in-law, passed away in a horrible car accident two weeks ago. So I’m here to see whether I can get some assistance from you to help us manage a little better.
E2I’m very sorry to hear that. I hope Andrew is coping well. So unfortunately, he is an orphan now. Is he living with your family? Does he have other relatives in Australia?33
M2对，他现在住在我们家。除了我们，他仅有的亲戚就是爷爷奶奶，外公外婆。但他们都不住在澳大利亚，而且很年迈了，不能照顾他。所以我是他的监护人。Yes, he lives with us. The only relatives he has besides us are his grandparents. But they are all living overseas and too old to look after him. So I am his guardian.
E3Well, as a relative caring for the child, you may be eligible to get various types of assistance from the Family Assistance Office and the Child Support Agency, in addition to assistance provided by Centrelink.35
M3也就是说，一般父母能够获得的补助，我都能获得是吗？我现在在领家庭税务福利 A，每两周能领 214 刀。对于 Andrew，我也可以领取同样的一份津贴吗？That is to say I can receive all the benefits that parents normally get, right? I’m receiving the family tax benefit A and receiving $214 per week. Can I receive one more payment the same for Andrew?
E4Yes, you are eligible for another payment of the Family Tax Benefit Part A but the amount may be different since it depends on the child’s age.26
M4Andrew 才 5 岁，白天一直需要人来照顾。但我和我妻子都要上班，所以必须要把 Andrew 交给别人照看。你们能在这方面帮我吗？Andrew is only 5 and he needs to be taken care of during the day. But my wife and I both have to work, so we have to find someone else to look after him. Can you help us with that?
E5Yes, we can help you with our Childcare Benefit, which is available for children who are looked after by approved or registered childcare centres. It can be claimed as reduced childcare fees or as a lump sum payment.38
M5这太好了。Andrew 真是一个可怜的孩子，我想尽力给他营造一个好的成长环境。幸亏有你们的帮助，不然这是不可能的。That’s great. Andrew is a poor child. I want to try my best to offer him a good environment to grow up in. However, I wouldn’t be able to do that without your help.
E6Supporting people in need is what we do. By the way, I think you are also eligible for the Double Orphan Pension, since both of Andrew’s parents are deceased.29
M6好的，谢谢。那我马上就填表申请吧。要是有什么问题我再来问你。Great, thanks. Then I’ll fill out the application form right away. I’ll get back to you if I have more questions.

entry.title: 失业社福
entry.content:
This is a dialogue between Mr. Liu (L), who is recently unemployed, and a Centrelink officer Harry (H). The dialogue begins now.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning Mr. Liu. I’m Harry, your customer service advisor. How can I help you today?16
M1我工作的工厂最近倒闭了，所以我失业了。因为劳动成本的原因，制造业在这个国家正在消亡。所以我来请你们帮助我。Good Morning, Harry. The factory I worked for was closed down recently so I’ve lost my job. The manufacturing industry is dying in this country because of rising labour costs.
E2Well, if that’s the case, I think we may be able to help you through this with the Newstart Allowance. But firstly, I need to determine whether you’re eligible for the allowance. Can I have a look at your ID please?41
M2给你，这是我的驾照。我从来没想到我会来求你们施舍。这种感觉真不好。This is my driver’s license. Here you are. I never thought I would come to you asking for charity. I feel terrible about it.
E3Please don’t think about it that way. It is our responsibility to help people get through difficult times. You meet the age requirement so you’ll need to enter into an Employment Pathway Plan.33
M3你能给我解释一下这个计划吗？是说只要我加入了这个计划，你们就能帮我找到工作吗？它需要我去做什么呢？Can you explain this plan to me? Are you saying that you will find a job for me if I join this plan? What does it require me to do?
E4An Employment Pathway Plan explains what you need to do to get a job or improve your employment prospects and what assistance you will be offered. The plan may contain activities such as job searching, vocational education and participation in a labour market program.44
M4所以，这个计划是由你们制定的，然后要求我严格遵行吗？如果我觉得某些活动不适合我怎么办？这样听起来似乎是你们想控制我的生活。So is it true that this plan is made by you, and then I need to follow it strictly? What if I think some activities are not suitable for me? It sounds like you will control my life.
E5That’s not how it works. We’ll negotiate with you to identify your individual needs but once we have both agreed on the plan you’ll have to participate in the activities. Otherwise, there will be a ‘No Show, No Pay’ penalty.40
M5既然是根据我的个人需求制定的计划，我肯定会欣然执行。我会珍惜一切机会来提高我找到工作的可能性。As long as it’s based on my personal needs, then I will definitely be happy to abide by it. I would appreciate every opportunity to improve my chances of getting employed.
E6Excellent. Please be aware that you need to regularly send us evidence that you are actively looking for suitable paid work and attend all job interviews.26
M6好的，我知道了。你能跟我说一下津贴的数额有多少？我如果偶尔做一些临时工，会不会影响我领取福利金？Alright, I see. Can you tell me how much the allowance is? If I occasionally do some casual work, will it affect my payment?

entry.title: 盗版光盘
entry.content:
This is a dialogue between Mr Philip, an officer from Customs and Border Protection and Mr. Lin, an Australian Citizen who just came back from a recent trip to China and has now arrived at Sydney International Airport.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Excuse me, sir. Can I see your passport and your Incoming Passenger Card please?
M1怎么了? 我没带什么不合法的东西，缉毒犬也已经过来闻过一遍了，没有任何特殊的反应。你们为什么把我拦下？What happened? I don’t have anything illegal with me and a sniffer dog has already checked around and it did not show any particular reactions. Why have you you stopped me?
E2The X-ray shows there may be some undeclared prohibited items in your baggage. If you are caught carrying undeclared, prohibited or restricted goods, you could be fined or prosecuted. Do you understand?
M2我既没有走私，也没带任何的违禁品。不过，您看我的行李都捆绑好了，要是把东西都拿出来再放回去是很费劲的。你们海关就是小题大做，专找我们亚洲人的麻烦。I’m neither smuggling, nor carrying any contraband. You see my luggage has been strapped up. It will be very troublesome if I have to take everything out and put it back in again. You Customs officers are just making a fuss about everything and picking on us Asians.
E3Do you know there are certain restricted goods you need to declare on arrival, such as firearms, weapons and ammunition, and currency of AUD$10,000 or over? Do any of those apply to you? Besides, if you are carrying certain kinds of medicines and substances, food, biological goods, or wildlife products etc, you must declare them.
M3这样啊。我就带了一些土特产给我父亲，他说他很想家，很怀念家乡的味道。 另外还有一些光碟是给我母亲的。你把我拦下来，是因为怀疑这些光碟是盗版的吗？I see. I only brought some local specialties for my father, because he said he was homesick and missing the local flavours of our hometown. Apart from that, there are some DVDs for my mother. Are you suspecting the DVDs are pirated? Is that why you stopped me here?
E4It is a normal practice for customs to run random luggage checks. Those DVDs have to be forfeited as they appear to be counterfeit. So does the local special produce that you have, since they are meat products. What is in those paper bags? Can you please open them?
M4那好吧，反正也不值什么钱。纸袋里没什么违禁的东西，就是一点草药。我妈 有慢性支气管炎，西药不管用，只治标不治本。所以我就在国内的中药店抓了一点草药给她。Alright. Those DVDs are not worth much. There is nothing illicit in those bags, just some herbs. My mom has chronic bronchitis, but western medicine doesn’t seem to be working for her. It only relieves the symptoms but does not cure the disease completely. So I bought some herbs for her at a pharmacy when I was in China.
E5You should have declared that traditional medicine on your Incoming Passenger Card, because they may contain endangered plant or animal products. I’m sorry, but that medicine also needs to be forfeited.
M5请不要这样。她需要这些药来治病的。您这不是要她的命吗？如果我交罚款, 你是不是就不会没收这些药了？Please don’t do that. They are very important for her treatment. Only if you want to kill her. Can I keep the medicine if I choose to pay a fine?
E6I don’t think so. It is advisable that you take her prescriptions to an Australian medical practitioner. I’m sure Chinese medicine practitioners here can help her with this matter.
M6随便你吧，看来也只能自认倒霉了。Whatever… it seems I have to accept this as bad luck.

entry.title: 就业赞助
entry.content:
A lady is talking to a shop manager, asking about the possibility of employment sponsorship.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1你好，你是这家按摩店的经理吗？我是 Lisa.Hello,areyouthemanagerofthismassageshop?MynameisLisa.
M1Yes I am. How are you? How can I help you, Lisa?
E2我是一名按摩师，在中国有将近 10 年的工作经验。听说你这儿在招聘，所以我过来试一试运气。I’m a masseuse with nearly 10 years work experience in China. I heard that you are hiring, so I’m here to try my luck.
M2Yes, currently we are short of experienced staff. I believe you understand that one requirement for this position is being able to communicate with clients.
E3当然了。我正在上英语课，也达到了一定的水平。但为了保证今天和你沟通的质量，我觉得还是通过口译员比较好。Of course. I’m taking an English course and have made some progress. But I thought I’d better speak to you via an interpreter to maintain smooth communication.
M3That’s fine. You will have to be familiar with the terminology related to remedial massage and aware of the specific needs of our clients. They’ll be more willing to come back if you can go the extra mile.
E4我明白。我之前一直在做按摩，所以我深知客人的不同需求。我现在非常想在这里定居。我真的不适合呆在大城市，我喜欢小镇的宁静与安逸。I understand. I’ve been doing this for a while so I know about the varying demands of customers. Now, I’d like to settle down here. I’m really not a big city person. I prefer peaceful and cozy small towns
M4Well, I suppose you’re interested in the Regional Sponsored Migration Scheme. I heard of this at a massage association meeting. They said under this scheme, qualified massage therapists can migrate here permanently.
E5是的，我之前也去中介咨询过。他们说我必须有这里的学历，所以我就去一家学院学了一个证书，并通过了这里的技术评估。Yes, I consulted an agent before, who said I had to have a local qualification. So I got a certificate at an institute and passed the skill assessment.
M5If we are to sponsor you, it will involve a financial commitment on our part as well as the time needed to prepare the application. We really need some time to consider it.
E6我完全理解。这样，我把我的简历给你，上面有我的联系方式，你们随时可以联系我。我也可以先工作，担保的是我们慢慢来。I totally understand. Let me give you my resume first, which has my contact details. You can contact me anytime. I can also start working first and discuss the issue of sponsorship later.
M6That would be perfect. Thank you very much. I’ll be in touch with you.

entry.title: 亲戚移民
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mr. Li and Herbert, a migration agent. Mr. Li is seeking advice on sponsoring an overseas relative to come to Australia to work.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Hello Mr. Li, you said to me last time that you wanted to sponsor overseas workers to come here, right?
M1是的。我在悉尼拥有一家食品加工厂，生产各种中式点心。我希望我的侄子能来澳洲帮我做事。Yes. I own a food processing factory in Sydney, producing various kinds of Chinese dim sims. I hope my nephew can come here and work for me.
E2Both the employer and the employee need to meet certain requirements to be eligible for the employer nomination scheme. As the employer, you must be actively and lawfully operating a business in Australia.
M2这个肯定没问题，我这个厂已经开了快 10 年了。我的产品非常受欢迎，你在各个华人超市都能买到。我的年营业额有四百多万呢。This is not a problem at all. I’ve been operating the factory for almost 10 years. My products are very popular and you can find them in every Chinese supermarket. The annual turnover is more than $4 million.
E3Then the position you provide must be full time, ongoing and available for at least three years. It must also be a highly skilled occupation that is on the Employer Nomination Scheme Occupation List (ENSOL).
M3这份清单是什么？我没听说过。我给我侄子安排的职位是食品技术员，您能帮我查查这个职位是否在这份清单上吗？What’s this list? I have never heard of it. The position I’m going to offer my nephew is food technologist. Could you check for me and see if it’s on the list?What’s this list? I have never heard of it. The position I’m going to offer my nephew is food technologist. Could you check for me and see if it’s on the list?
E4You can only nominate overseas workers to fill a position in an occupation that appears on the ENSOL. Let me have a look. Well, food technologist is on the list. That’s very good!
M4那我的侄子需要满足哪些条件呢？他在国内大学学的就是食品科技，毕业后至今已经有了五年的相关工作经验。在技术与资质方面 他应该是没问题的。What requirements does my nephew need to meet? He studied food technology at university in China and has five years’ relevant working experience after graduation. There shouldn’t be any problems in terms of his skills and qualifications.
E5That seems good enough. You should also be aware that he needs to meet the vocational English language requirements. That is to say, he needs to score 5 in each of the four sections of the IELTS test.
M5我不太了解他的英语水平。不过雅思 5 分对于他这样一个读过大学的人来说应该不是什么难事吧。I’m not sure about his English level. However, for a university graduate, scoring 5 in the IELTS test should not be very difficult, I reckon.
E6Other requirements are more general. For example, your nephew needs to show evidence of good health and character and sign the Australian Values Statement.
M6多谢你啦，让我有了一个大致的概念。看来这并没有我想像的困难。Thank you for giving me a rough idea. It seems like it’s not as difficult as I thought it would be.

entry.title: 母亲移民
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mr. Lu, a new migrant, and Henry, an immigration officer. Mr. Lu is seeking advice regarding bringing his mother to live in Australia.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Sorry for keeping you waiting for so long. How can I help you today?
M1我希望你可以帮到我。我想要一些资讯关于我的母亲是不是可以在澳洲和我的家人生活在一起。I do hope you can help me. I’d like to have some information regarding whether my mother can come and live with my family in Australia.
E2Well first of all, are you an Australian citizen or permanent resident? Also, if you don’t mind me asking, how old is your mother?我从 1999 年就已经是澳洲公民了。我的父亲不久前刚去世, 留下我
M2母亲一个人生活。到三月份我母亲就 63 岁了。I have been an Australian citizen since 1999. My father passed away not long ago, leaving my mother alone. My mother will turn 63 in March.
E3In that case, she may be eligible to apply for a parent visa to come to Australia as an aged parent. But she also needs to pass the family balance test.
M3你能不能给我解释一下什么是家庭平衡测试？我听说过，但是并不是真正的明白。Could you explain to me what the family balance test is? I have heard of it but I don’t really understand.
E4Basically to pass the family balance test, at least half of your mother’s children must be living in Australia or more of them live in Australia than any other single country.
M4我明白了。我有一个妹妹她生活在墨尔本，和一个哥哥住在中国。我母亲没有其他的子女或继子女了。I see. I have a younger sister living in Melbourne and an older brother living in China. My mother doesn’t have any other children or step-children.
E5Well if that is the case, it makes your mother eligible to apply to come here as an aged parent. She needs to complete and sign an application form. I would also suggest that you buy a copy of our parent migration booklet.
M5行，我会先把表格里该填都帮她填好，然后再寄回中国给她签字。 可是，为什么我需要买一本小册子呢？Ok. I will fill out everything on the application form for her first, and then send it to China so she can sign it. But why do I need to buy a booklet?
E6It contains the information you need regarding applying for a parent visa. It lists the basic requirements that must be met and sponsorship information and contains the application form and a checklist of supporting documents.
M6我明白了。好吧。我买一份。告诉我，一旦你们收到她的申请表，申请的处理过程需要多长时间？申请费要多少钱？I see. Ok, I’ll take one. Could you tell me, once you receive her application, how long will it take to process? How much is the application fee?
E7We can’t begin processing her application unless the application form is signed and every question is answered. Also, the supporting documents must be attached and the visa application fee must be paid. The current fee is 1,470 Australian dollars and there’s no refund given for unsuccessful applications.
M7我明白了。那么，如果我们递交了所有的文件和表格，并且付了申请费。申请受理要多长时间？I understand. So how long is the processing time once we have submitted all the documents and forms and paid the fee?
E8I’m afraid that the average timeframe for processing applications in the aged parent category is currently 24 to 48 months.
M8我明白了。好的，我要一份小册子。再回家和我的家人商量一下。谢谢。All right. I see. I’ll take a booklet. Then I’ll go home and discuss it with my family. Thank you.

entry.title: 入籍咨询
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mr. Guan and Allan, an immigration officer. Mr Guan is enquiring about applying for Australian citizenship.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1你好，我今天来是想咨询一下入籍的事。我有几个问题想向你请教。Hello! I’m here today to enquire about citizenship. I’ve got some questions to ask you.
M1Sure, I can help you with that. I’m Allan, a citizenship department officer. Please go ahead.
E2我去年 2 月成为了永久居民。我现在在犹豫要不要入籍。你可以告诉我成为澳大利亚公民有哪些好处呢？I became a permanent resident last February. Now I’m considering whether I should apply for citizenship. Can you tell me the benefits of becoming an Australian citizen?
M2Australian citizenship offers a range of benefits. You can vote in federal and state or territory elections and in a referendum and seek election to parliament. You can also apply for work in the Australian Public Service or in the Australian Defence Force.
E3同样，我也可以持有澳大利亚护照了吧。凭着这本护照，我可以免签去很多国家，对吗？我对于我来说是个比较实际的好处。Also I can receive an Australian passport with which I can visit many countries visa-free, right? For me this is a real benefit.
M3That’s correct. An Australian passport will enable you to visit over 100 countries on a visa-free basis. Also, you can receive help from Australian consular and embassy officials while overseas.
E4嗯…那何时可以申请入籍呢？是当我成为永久居民满两年吗？还是有其他什么具体规定？Hmm… Then when can I apply for Australian citizenship? Is it after I have been a permanent resident for two years or are there other conditions?
M4Actually, you have to meet the residence requirements. This means you must have 4 years lawful residence in Australia. This period must include 12 months as a permanent resident immediately before making an application for Australian citizenship. Also, you must have absences from Australia of no more than 12 months in total in the 4 years prior to application, including not more than 90 days in the 12 months immediately prior to the application.
E5除了我的身份证件以外，我还需要递交哪些文件呢？是否需要无犯罪记录证明呢？这个申请不会向永久居留的申请那样等那么久吧？What documents should I submit besides my identification documents? Do I need to provide a certificate of no criminal record? Will the processing time of this application be as long as the application for permanent residency?
M5Yes you need to include documents proving you are of good character. I can’t tell you the exact processing time but I think it should be much shorter than the processing time for permanent residency.
E6最后我要参加入籍仪式对吧。你可以跟我说一下入籍仪式有哪些内容呢？The final step of citizenship is to attend the citizenship ceremony, right? Could you tell me what will happen at the ceremony?
M6After you are seated there will be a formal introduction, speeches and an address that precedes making the pledge. Then the presiding officer will ask you to repeat the pledge of commitment out loud. Once you have made the pledge you will be an Australian citizen.

entry.title: 工签续签
entry.content:
This is a dialogue between Mr. Liu (L), who wants to extend his working visa and an immigration officer, Haydn (H).
IDOriginalTranslated
E1So, your visa expires next month, in 25 days actually and you want an extension. On what grounds are you applying for an extension?
M1我持有工作签证在这里已经有十一个月了。在这期间，我不但交了很多税，还经常去教堂做义工。I have been here on a working visa for eleven months. During this period, I not only paid a lot of taxes, but also often volunteered at a church.
E2I’m afraid you need to include some reasons other than those in your application. Is there an employer who can guarantee your employment and can claim that he needs your skills?
M2收到全球金融危机的冲击，我之前的雇主不得不裁减员工。不幸的是我也是其中一个。所以现在没有工作。如果你给我些时间，我可以找到。Because of the impact of the global financial crisis, my previous employer had to cut staff. Unfortunately, I was one of them. So I don’t have an employer now but if you give me more time I can find one.
E3It’s not up to me to give you time to do that. You do have 35 days after the expiry of your visa to find another job. However, if you aren’t able to secure employment within 35 days, you simply must leave. There is no other way.
M3我明白。但是我原想你能对我的案子区别对待。澳洲这么大，多一个人，又有什么关系？I understand that but I thought you might treat my case as an exception. Australia is such a big country. Does it really matter to keep one more person here?
E4You don’t seem to understand that this situation is out of my control. I’m not the one who makes the law. I’m afraid only the Minister has the discretion to approve special applications.
M4求求你。你一定有什么可以帮我的。我有家庭，他们得靠我。如果我不寄钱回家他们会挨饿。我实在是很绝望。Please. You must be able to help me in some way. I have a family who depends on me and they will starve if I stop sending money back home. I’m really desperate!
E5Please sir. You are making this very difficult. There’s simply nothing I can do to help you. If you can find someone to sponsor you within the next two months you might be okay. Otherwise, I’m afraid you have to leave Australia.
M5我怎样才能找到一位雇主呢？一般人雇主都不大喜欢快过期的签证。有谁你认识的可以帮助我？How can I find an employer? Most employers would frown upon people with expiring visas. Do you know someone who can help me?
E6Why don’t you try your local community? Find out if there is a group that can help you. There are usually community welfare groups or you can check the Chinese newspaper.
M6对了。这我可没想到。你讲得没错。一定办法的。谢谢你的指点。Yes. I hadn’t thought of that. You are right. There must be a solution to this. Thanks for your advice.

entry.title: 签证拒签
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mr. Lu, and Henry, an immigration officer. Mr. Lu is enquiring about the visa rejection decision on behalf of his family.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good afternoon, Mr. Lu. I understand that you have come in to clarify some matters regarding your family’s visa applications.
M1是的，没错。我们刚受到了你们移民局发来的签证拒签通知。我们很震惊，也很失望。Yes, that’s right. We have just received the visa rejection notice from you. We feel shocked and very disappointed.
E2I’m sorry to hear that. However, we cannot comment on the rejection of their applications apart from the information contained in the decision letter.
M2我知道，你之前就说过了。今天我想问的是移民部是否能重新考虑这个案子。我赚钱养国内的家人。我很久没见到他们了。I know, you told me that already. What I’m asking you is whether your department can reconsider the case. I am supporting my family back in China. I haven’t seen them for a long time.
E3That’s really quite unfortunate. However, all we can do is to consider applications, then accept or refuse them. One path for you would be to encourage your family to reapply.
M3好吧，那他们重新申请了会怎样？会有什么不同吗？他们第一次申请时就满足了所有要求，但你们还是拒绝批签。Ok and what if they reapply? Will it make any difference? They met all the requirements in the first application but you still refused to grant them the visa.
E4I have already said that I can’t comment. I appreciate your circumstances and I sincerely wish that I could help. Believe me, I meet people in your position every day and I have nothing but sympathy for them.
M4我不是对你无礼，但我觉得你有点不讲道理。一开始你告诉我你们部门可能有失误，然后你又说我家人的文件有问题。你也不告诉我是哪些问题。Look, I don’t want to be rude but I think you are being a bit unreasonable. First you told me your department might have made a mistake. Then you said that there are some problems with their documents. But you won’t tell me what these problems are.
E5No, no. Let me make this clear. With respect, Mr. Lu, I think you have the facts a little distorted. I said that I suspected that there had been some problems with the documentation. If you want to keep on arguing, this interview is a waste of your time and mine.
M5好，那我冷静一下。但他们在家等移民部的回复已经浪费了几个月了。想想他们吧。你让他们建立起很高的期望，然后又让这期望破灭。至少给我们一个机会吧。Fine. I’ll calm down, but my family have wasted months sitting around waiting for a reply from your department. Please think of them. You built up their expectations and then you destroyed them. Give us a chance at least.
E6Nobody’s expectations were built up. They should not have made any assumptions until their visas were granted.
M6我要拿头撞墙了。给我个直截了当的答案，是还是否。他们重新申请签证到底有没有意义？你一定能给我点有用的信息。Oh, come on! Just give me a straight answer – yes or no. Is there any point in them reapplying for a visa? Surely you can give me some idea.

entry.title: 庇护签证
entry.content:
The following dialogue is between Mr. Guan and Adam, an immigration officer. Mr. Guan is enquiring about applying for a protection visa.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1你好，我想申请庇护签证，希望你能帮我。Hello! I’d like to apply for a protection visa and I hope you can help me with that.
M1Well, I will see what I can do. First, please let me ask a few questions. When did you come to Australia and what visa are you on?
E2我 2008 年 2 月持 573 学生签证来悉尼大学读传媒学的硕士。I came to Australia in February 2008 on a student visa subclass 573. I came here to do a master’s degree majoring in media at the University of Sydney.
M2So on what grounds are you applying for a protection visa then? You should be aware that you must be a refugee as defined by the Refugee Convention.
E3我在中国时是个记者，来澳以后在博客上写了很多批评中国政府的文章。我担心回国以后会因政治原因受到迫害。I was a journalist in China. After I came here I wrote many articles on my blog, criticising the Chinese government. I’m worried that when I go back there I will be persecuted for political reasons.
M3How can you be sure you will be persecuted? Publishing some articles alone seems insufficient to support the claim that you will be in danger back home.
E4我的家人已经被监视了！我现在已不敢和他们联系。我一个同事因为发表一些揭露政府丑闻的文章已失踪了。My family has been under surveillance! I’m too afraid to contact them now. One of my colleagues has gone missing for publishing some articles exposing the government scandals.
M4You should include documentary evidence to support your claims in your application. If the documents are not written in English, you will need to have them translated by an accredited translator. It’s strongly recommended that you seek legal advice before lodging the application.
E5如果我的签证批准了，我可以把国内的父母接来澳洲吗？因为我会不可能回国了。If my visa application is approved, can my parents come to Australia to join me as I will never get the chance to go back to my country?
M5You can sponsor your immediate family, such as your spouse and children to come to Australia when you are granted with the protection visa. However parents are not included. You can choose to apply through the parent migration program after you have had the protection visa for over two years.
E6那如果我的申请不被批准会怎样？我能够有上诉重申吗？要知道， 我要是被捕了，有可能会受到睡眠剥夺等非人道的折磨。What if my application is rejected? Can I have my case reviewed? You know, if I am arrested, I may face various kinds of inhumane torture such
M6Yes. You have the right to seek a review of this decision by an independent tribunal, either the Refugee Review Tribunal (RRT) or the Administrative Appeals Tribunal (AAT).as sleep deprivation.
